steps.title: Substitute for y
steps.content:
From the second equation, $y=-7x+49$. Substitute this into the first equation.
$$x^2=7x+(-7x+49)$$
$$x^2=49$$

steps.title: Find possible products
steps.content:
The possible $x$-values are $7$ and $-7$. If $x=7$, then $y=0$; if $x=-7$, then $y=98$.
$$xy=7(0)=0$$
$$xy=(-7)(98)=-686$$

steps.title: Match the listed value
steps.content: Of the products found, only $0$ appears among the choices. The answer is A.
